title: Restaurant Complaint
text:
## Restaurant Complaint

Dear Manager,

I visited your {adjective} restaurant last {place} and ordered the chef's {adjective} special.

**The soup:** Tasted like {food} mixed with {food} and was served at a {adjective} temperature.

**Service:** My server, who wore {color} shoes, forgot to {verb} our table twice.

**Dessert:** We received a {object} that looked like a small {animal}.

**The check:** When I asked for the bill, the total seemed {adjective}. Please refund my {number} and consider hiring a {adjective} host who can {verb} without causing panic.
